name: vscode-remote-proxy
description: Automatically reverse-forward a local proxy into VS Code Remote SSH and apply proxy settings for terminals, extensions, and Git.

commands.title: Remote Proxy: Clear SSH Host Override

remoteProxy.autoStart.description: Automatically start forwarding when a supported remote window opens.

remoteProxy.backend.description: Choose the forwarding backend. auto uses the ssh_proxy daemon; OpenSSH is an explicit legacy backend.

remoteProxy.localProxy.mode.description: How to find the local proxy. auto checks manual URL, environment variables, then common ports.

remoteProxy.localProxy.url.description: Manual local proxy URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:<port> or socks5://127.0.0.1:<port>.

remoteProxy.localProxy.hosts.description: Local hosts to probe when detecting proxy ports.

remoteProxy.localProxy.autoPorts.description: Local ports to probe when detecting a proxy.

remoteProxy.localProxy.defaultScheme.description: Proxy scheme to use for detected ports that came from probing instead of a URL.

remoteProxy.remote.port.description: Remote loopback port exposed by SSH reverse forwarding.

remoteProxy.remote.autoPickPort.description: Automatically try nearby remote ports when the preferred port is already in use.

remoteProxy.remote.portRangeSize.description: Number of remote ports to try, starting at remoteProxy.remote.port, when autoPickPort is enabled.

remoteProxy.remote.bindHost.description: Remote bind address for the forwarded proxy. Keep this as 127.0.0.1 unless you intentionally need a wider bind.

remoteProxy.noProxy.description: NO_PROXY value written to terminal and server environments.

remoteProxy.hostProfiles.description: Per-host overrides keyed by SSH alias or resolved user@hostname.

localProxyUrl.description: Override local proxy URL for this host.

remotePort.description: Preferred remote proxy port for this host.

remoteBindHost.description: Remote bind address for this host.

applyGitConfig.description: Whether to set Git proxy config for this host.

applyGitGlobalConfig.description: Whether to set global Git proxy config for this host.

applyGitWorkspaceConfig.description: Whether to set workspace Git proxy config for this host.

applyGitForceOverride.description: Whether to overwrite existing Git proxy config values for this host.

applyServerEnvSetup.description: Whether to patch server-env-setup for this host.

remoteProxy.ssh.executable.description: SSH executable used for reverse forwarding and remote setup.

remoteProxy.ssh.host.description: Override SSH host alias. Leave empty to derive it from the Remote SSH authority.

remoteProxy.ssh.useStorageFallback.description: Allow automatic SSH host detection from VS Code globalStorage when no current-window signal is available. Disabled by default because this storage can be stale in Extension Development Host windows.

remoteProxy.ssh.args.description: Extra arguments passed to ssh before the host.

remoteProxy.ssh.batchMode.description: Pass BatchMode=yes to ssh so background commands fail instead of waiting for an interactive password prompt.

remoteProxy.ssh.serverAliveInterval.description: SSH ServerAliveInterval in seconds for the background reverse tunnel.

remoteProxy.ssh.serverAliveCountMax.description: SSH ServerAliveCountMax for the background reverse tunnel.

remoteProxy.ssh.tcpKeepAlive.description: Pass TCPKeepAlive=yes to the background SSH reverse tunnel.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.executable.description: ssh_proxy executable used by the kernel backend.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.autoInstallLocalSer.description: Probe existing service scopes first, then repair or install the local ssh_proxy service before creating a kernel route.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.allowElevationPromp.description: Allow interactive Remote Proxy commands to prompt for elevated service install or update when required. Auto-start never prompts for elevation.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.preferPersistentSer.description: Prefer an existing or repairable persistent ssh_proxy service before starting a session-owned daemon.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.openSshFallbackPoli.description: Controls when OpenSSH can be used after the Rust daemon path. The default keeps OpenSSH disabled; legacy-auto restores the older fallback chain.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.brokerMode.description: Controls how the kernel backend selects persistent broker service, session daemon, or direct control endpoints.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.connectMode.description: Route connect mode used by the ssh_proxy kernel backend.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.routeVolatile.description: Create kernel routes as volatile by default.

remoteProxy.sshProxy.remoteSetup.description: Choose the remote setup command runner used after a kernel route starts.

remoteProxy.forward.retryOnExit.description: Restart the SSH reverse-forward process if it exits unexpectedly.

remoteProxy.forward.retryDelaySeconds.description: Delay before restarting the SSH reverse-forward process after an unexpected exit.

remoteProxy.forward.restartOnHostChange.description: Automatically restart forwarding when the detected Remote SSH host changes.

remoteProxy.forward.verifyAfterStart.description: Verify that the remote forwarded port accepts TCP connections after starting ssh -R.

remoteProxy.forward.healthCheckEnabled.description: Periodically verify that the active or reused remote forwarded port is still reachable, and restart or take over if it fails.

remoteProxy.forward.healthCheckIntervalS.description: Interval for active remote forwarded port health checks.

remoteProxy.forward.healthCheckFailureTh.description: Consecutive failed health checks required before restarting an active proxy route.

remoteProxy.forward.restartBackoffMaxSec.description: Maximum exponential backoff delay before restarting after repeated health check failures.

remoteProxy.singleton.reuseEnabled.description: Reuse one local ssh -R proxy tunnel across multiple VS Code windows connected to the same SSH user and server.

remoteProxy.singleton.leaseTtlSeconds.description: How long a tunnel lease heartbeat remains fresh before another window may take over.

remoteProxy.singleton.startLockTimeoutSe.description: How long a window waits for another window's in-progress proxy start before taking over a stale start lock.

remoteProxy.apply.vscodeSettings.description: Also apply http.proxy and terminal.integrated.env through the VS Code configuration API. Disabled by default because this UI extension may otherwise update local user settings.

remoteProxy.apply.remoteMachineSettings.description: For SSH remotes, also patch the remote VS Code server Machine settings file.

remoteProxy.apply.terminalEnv.description: Set HTTP_PROXY, HTTPS_PROXY, ALL_PROXY, and NO_PROXY for integrated terminals.

remoteProxy.apply.gitConfig.description: Set remote Git http.proxy and https.proxy through ssh.

remoteProxy.apply.gitGlobalConfig.description: Force-set remote global Git http.proxy and https.proxy.

remoteProxy.apply.gitWorkspaceConfig.description: Force-set local Git proxy config for each current remote workspace folder that is inside a Git worktree.

remoteProxy.apply.gitForceOverride.description: Use git config --replace-all so existing Git proxy values are overwritten instead of appended.

remoteProxy.apply.serverEnvSetup.description: Patch ~/.vscode-server/server-env-setup so remote extensions inherit proxy environment variables after reconnect.

remoteProxy.apply.remoteStatusFile.description: Write ~/.vscode-server/remote-proxy-status.json with the active proxy URL for diagnostics and shell integrations.

remoteProxy.apply.proxySupport.description: Value for VS Code's http.proxySupport setting.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test test/sshProxyRouteArgs.test.js test/sshProxyCli.test.js test/sshProxyKernelStatus.test.js test/kernelRecoveryCoordinator.test.js test/packageConfig.test.js test/commandDefinitions.test.js test/proxyLeaseRecord.test.js test/proxyLease.test.js test/portPersistence.test.js test/reliabilityPolicy.test.js test/healthMonitor.test.js test/startupCoordinator.test.js test/remoteProxyMenu.test.js test/quickPickItems.test.js test/diagnosticsPresenter.test.js test/statusDisplay.test.js test/remoteSetupScripts.test.js test/remoteSetupReady.test.js test/remoteCommandRunnerUtils.test.js test/remoteSetupRunnerPolicy.test.js test/routeOwnership.test.js test/sshProxyDiscovery.test.js
